species: Hyphal forms of Candida albicans (the major etiological agent of IC) are related to invasion of host tissues.
cell_type: Hyphal cell forms were observed in both media.
disease_state: Invasive candidiasis (IC) is associated with high morbidity and mortality...
sample_source: we characterized the C. albicans hyphal secretome by gel-free proteomic analysis, and further assessed the antibody-reactivity patterns to this subproteome in serum pools from 12 patients with non-catheter-associated IC (ncIC), 11 patients with catheter-associated IC (cIC), and 11 non-IC patients.
cell_line: C. albicans strain SC5314 was maintained in yeast extract-peptone-dextrose (YPD) plates...
